title: Zeppelin family in Japan
wikitext:
[]: Zeppelin family in Japan             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat May 14, 2005 1:51 pm While trawling for material about the Zeppelin name, to confirm my belief that Asuka, via her mother, is indeed the scion of Prussian nobility, I found that someone had already made some interesting discoveries, that a branch of the Zeppelin family had contacts with Japan in the early 19th century http://www.evamade.org/forum_viewtopic.php?8.34478

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 14, 2005 4:58 pm Interesting stuff, though I might question whether Anno was aware for all this. Before I saw this new information, I had been convinced that a red-haired, blue-eyed girl of Japanese and german decent was so great a statistical impossibilty, that it was likely no such human would have existed by 2015.

Article: Zeppelin family in Japan
[]: Zeppelin family in Japan             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat May 14, 2005 1:51 pm While trawling for material about the Zeppelin name, to confirm my belief that Asuka, via her mother, is indeed the scion of Prussian nobility, I found that someone had already made some interesting discoveries, that a branch of the Zeppelin family had contacts with Japan in the early 19th century http://www.evamade.org/forum_viewtopic.php?8.34478

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 14, 2005 4:58 pm Interesting stuff, though I might question whether Anno was aware for all this. Before I saw this new information, I had been convinced that a red-haired, blue-eyed girl of Japanese and german decent was so great a statistical impossibilty, that it was likely no such human would have existed by 2015.
